notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki plunked
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki hit by pitch. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Ian Happ to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Moisés Ballesteros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Moisés Ballesteros walks. Ian Happ scores. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd. Dansby Swanson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Scott Kingery.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Scott Kingery.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher José Alvarado. Michael Busch scores. Scott Kingery to 3rd. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: J.T. Realmuto reaches on a fielder's choice. Adolis García to 3rd. Adolis García advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman Scott Kingery.

notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Scott Kingery.
